description_long: This object is a classic quad roller skate featuring a high-top white leather boot with reinforced stitching and a padded collar for ankle support. The boot is secured with white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and the tongue is slightly padded for comfort. The sole is dark brown, likely made of wood or dense plastic, and connects to a metal plate that supports the wheel assembly. There are four brown polyurethane wheels arranged in two parallel pairs, each attached to visible metal axles and trucks. The front of the skate has a brown rubber toe stop for braking, and the overall design is reminiscent of traditional rink or artistic roller skates. The branding is subtly visible on the side of the boot, adding a touch of authenticity.
description: A white high-top quad roller skate with brown wheels, a brown toe stop, and white laces, featuring a classic rink-style design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white laced boot, brown toe stop, and two front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high-top boot, side branding, and all four brown wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam of the boot and the two rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the boot's stitching, laces, and the full wheel assembly.
attribute_roller_skates: Quad roller skates with a high-top white leather boot, four brown polyurethane wheels, white laces, a brown rubber toe stop, and subtle side branding.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing is visible; only the roller skate itself is present, characterized by a classic, retro rink style.
attribute_pose: No figure is present; only a single roller skate is shown.
